assertions.title: Root CLI help and version are fully renamed

steps.expected: Root help presents the shipped command as `papierklammer` with no operator-visible `Paperclip` or `paperclipai` copy.
Version probe succeeds for the renamed `papierklammer` command only.
steps.observed:
Exit 0; output='> papierklammer@ papierklammer /Users/aischool/work/papierklammer_droid
> node cli/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs cli/src/index.ts "--version"

0.2.7'

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Forbidden token hits in combined help/version output: []

assertions.title: Onboard, doctor, run, configure, env, backup, and bootstrap copy is renamed

steps.action: Inspect help for `onboard`, `doctor`, `run`, `configure`, `env`, `db:backup`, and `auth bootstrap-ceo` plus a safe `configure` failure path.
steps.expected: The operator command set uses only `Papierklammer`/`papierklammer` wording and safe next-step copy.
steps.observed: Command exits={'onboard help': 0, 'doctor help': 0, 'run help': 0, 'configure help': 0, 'configure failure': 0, 'env output': 0, 'db:backup help': 0, 'auth bootstrap-ceo help': 0}; configure failure used renamed next-step copy; legacyHits=[]

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Forbidden token hits across the inspected command set: []

assertions.title: Shared client and worktree operator guidance is renamed

steps.action: Inspect `context`, `issue create`, `agent local-cli`, `worktree`, and `worktree:make` help plus an `issue list` missing-company error path.
steps.expected: Shared help/error guidance uses only `papierklammer`, `Papierklammer API`, and renamed local-instance wording.
steps.observed: Command exits={'context help': 0, 'issue create help': 0, 'issue list missing company': 1, 'agent local-cli help': 0, 'worktree help': 0, 'worktree make help': 0}; missing-company error mentioned `papierklammer context set`; legacyHits=[]

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Forbidden token hits across the shared help/error probes: []

assertions.title: Active setup and smoke scripts invoke renamed entrypoints and labels

steps.action: Run a deterministic script inventory scan across package.json plus active setup/smoke scripts under `scripts/`.
steps.expected: The in-scope setup and smoke script surfaces advertise renamed entrypoints/labels only and do not expose forbidden legacy tokens.
steps.observed: Scanned 9 files; positiveMatches=207; forbiddenHits=[{'file': 'scripts/clean-onboard-git.sh', 'line': 10, 'label': 'paperclipai', 'text': 'git clone https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip.git repo'}, {'file': 'scripts/clean-onboard-npm.sh', 'line': 13, 'label': 'paperclipai', 'text': 'npx --yes paperclipai onboard --yes --data-dir "$PC_DATA"'}, {'file': 'scripts/clean-onboard-ref.sh', 'line': 20, 'label': 'Paperclip', 'text': 'PC_DATA=/tmp/data           Paperclip data dir to use'}]

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Forbidden script-scan hits: [{'file': 'scripts/clean-onboard-git.sh', 'line': 10, 'label': 'paperclipai', 'text': 'git clone https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip.git repo'}, {'file': 'scripts/clean-onboard-npm.sh', 'line': 13, 'label': 'paperclipai', 'text': 'npx --yes paperclipai onboard --yes --data-dir "$PC_DATA"'}, {'file': 'scripts/clean-onboard-ref.sh', 'line': 20, 'label': 'Paperclip', 'text': 'PC_DATA=/tmp/data           Paperclip data dir to use'}]

assertions.issues: The deterministic setup/smoke script scan found legacy tokens in active operator-facing scripts.

assertions.title: Legacy CLI entrypoints, aliases, and Paperclip-named flags are not part of the live surface

steps.action: Re-check root help and attempt representative legacy entrypoints/flags (`paperclip`, `paperclipai`, and `--paperclip-api-url`).
steps.expected: The shipped help does not advertise legacy names, and legacy entrypoints/flags fail instead of aliasing.
steps.observed: Root help exited 0 with no legacy branding; `paperclip`, `paperclipai`, and `--paperclip-api-url` all failed as expected (254/254/1).

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Root help itself was clean; the transcript mentions `paperclip`/`paperclipai` only because those deliberate legacy invocations failed as part of the assertion.

assertions.title: Generated artifact names from backup, worktree, and dev helpers are renamed

steps.expected: The generated backup artifact name is prefixed with `papierklammer`.

steps.action: Inspect `papierklammer worktree:make --help` for the generated worktree naming contract.
steps.expected: Worktree helper output advertises the renamed `papierklammer-` auto-prefix.

steps.action: Run `pnpm --dir ... dev:list` against the live local app.
steps.expected: Dev helper labels use renamed `papierklammer-*` service names.
steps.observed:
Exit 0; output='> papierklammer@ dev:list /Users/aischool/work/papierklammer_droid
> pnpm --filter @papierklammer/server exec tsx ../scripts/dev-service.ts list

papierklammer-dev-once pid=99920 group=99920 child=99920 cwd=/Users/aischool/work/papierklammer_droid/server url=http://127.0.0.1:3100'

assertions.title: OpenClaw onboarding and gateway-facing rename contract is coherent

steps.action: Create a live OpenClaw invite prompt, fetch the generated onboarding manifest/text, inspect the shipped OpenClaw smoke helper, and fetch the generated OpenClaw gateway runtime text.
steps.expected: The onboarding/join surface, gateway-facing runtime text, and active smoke helper all expose only renamed skill/CLI/header/config identifiers.

assertions.title: Main CLI-to-server mutation flow uses the renamed run-trace contract end-to-end

steps.action: Create an issue through the shipped CLI (`papierklammer issue create ... --json`) and then inspect the server-side activity record for that issue.
steps.expected: The CLI mutation flow sends the renamed run-trace header so the server-side observable event records a non-empty renamed run id, without relying on any legacy `X-Paperclip-*` contract.

evidence.network: CLI POST /api/companies/a636b196-1514-4b29-a3fc-ee9863c8d3c4/issues via `papierklammer issue create`; follow-up GET /api/issues/3cd04864-a6c5-4a05-a82e-103e76ab475f/activity -> 200
evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Observed server-side runId for the created issue activity event: None

assertions.issues: The representative CLI mutation created the issue successfully, but the follow-up server activity event recorded `runId: null`, so the shipped operator CLI flow did not carry a renamed run-trace header end-to-end.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: VAL-CLI-001=pass; VAL-CLI-002=pass; VAL-CLI-003=pass; VAL-CLI-004=fail (The deterministic setup/smoke script scan found legacy tokens in active operator-facing scripts.); VAL-CLI-005=pass; VAL-CLI-006=pass; VAL-CROSS-003=pass; VAL-CROSS-005=fail (The representative CLI mutation created the issue successfully, but the follow-up server activity event recorded `runId: null`, so the shipped operator CLI flow did not carry a renamed run-trace header end-to-end.).
